item.title: tomcat设置系统服务
item.author: langhaidian
item.description: 编辑系统服务 vi /etc/systemd/system/tomcat.service [Unit] Description=Tomcat8540 After=syslog.target network.target remote-fs.target nss-lookup.target [Service] Type=oneshot ExecStart=/usr/local/apache-tomcat-8.5.40/bin/startup.sh ExecStop=/usr/local/apache-tomcat-8.5.40/bin/shutdown.sh ExecReload=/bin/kill -s HUP $MAINPID RemainAfterExit=yes [Install] WantedBy=multi-user.target 设置开机启动 systemctl enable tomcat 启动服务 systemctl start tomcat
